bird.name: 巴布亞企鵝
bird.summary: 白眉企鹅（台湾作巴布亞企鵝，学名：Pygoscelis papua），亦稱金圖企鵝，其种加词“papua”意为“巴布亚的”。巴布亞企鵝是僅次於皇帝企鵝和國王企鵝的體型最大的企鵝物種。牠們是企鵝家族中游泳速度最快的選手，游泳的時速可達36公里。 巴布亞企鵝在英語中的「Gentoo…

relations.subject: 巴布亞企鵝
relations.evidence: Due to regional climate change, they colonise previously inaccessible territories to the south
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

relations.subject: 巴布亞企鵝
relations.evidence: Examples include Bird Island, South Georgia, where the population has fallen by two-thirds over 25 years. Many threats to this species, including pollution, hunting, fishing, and human recreational activities, continue to affect them
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: 巴布亞企鵝

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
